highlights.text: I re-affirmed Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is that ES can try to follow up this rally more.
Secondly, it means ES alternates between two types of price action: Deep, “elevator down” sells, and vicious short squeezes (which typically just end up getting sold).

This next leg would target 5997, then 6038, then 6070 if bulls really want to run.” By Monday, we squeezed 190 points to 6070, then began another deep “elevator down” sell, which took us to 5928 by this morning.
I’d need to see a failed breakdown of todays 5935 low, ideally down to 5928, then recovery to get long”.
This Failed Breakdown setup played out multiple times today to put in a small green day.

post_title: SPX Manages A Small Green Day, But Will It Get Sold Like All The Others? Jan 9th/10th Plan
